title: IIT Guwahati Personality Development Trainer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
organization: Indian Institute of Technology Guwahati (IIT Guwahati)
short_info: Indian Institute of Technology Guwahati (IIT Guwahati) Personality Development Trainer Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of IIT Guwahati. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the IIT Guwahati Personality Development Trainer Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: MBA/MHRM or equivalent from a recognized university with at least 60% marks
qualification.details: Personality Development Trainer : MBA/MHRM or equivalent from a recognized university with at least 60% marks. Minimum 2 years of experience in conducting personality training programs and interview preparation activities.

selection_process: Online Application Shortlisting based on qualification
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIT Guwahati Personality Development Trainer Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 12-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Guwahati to complete the application.
